Celtic_Sea_Status_Quo_Model

Jessica Westworth

Source: vignettes/Celtic_Sea_Status_Quo_Model.qmd

Introduction

Creating a model representing the average state of the Celtic Sea from 2012 to 2024. Composed of 15 species: herring (Clupea harengus), cod (Gadus morhua), haddock (Melanogrammus aeglefinus), whiting (Merlangius merlangus), blue whiting (Micromesistius poutassou), hake (Merluccius merluccius), monkfish (Lophius piscatorius), horse mackerel (Trachurus trachurus), mackerel (Scomber scombrus), plaice (Pleuronectes platessa), megrim (Lepidorhombus whiffiagonis), sole (Solea solea), boarfish (Capros aper), dragonet (Callionymus spp.), and red gurnard (Chelidonicthys cuculus).

Loading in Repository and Libraries 

library(mizer)
library(mizerEcopath)
library(dplyr)
library(here)

Load in Data

Data includes: life_history parameters (l_mat and age_mat calculated from DATRAS data; w_max and LWR from Fishbase); landing distributions form STECF; survey size distribution and age at length distribution data from DATRAS; Stomach contents data; Biomass estimates, yield estimates, interaction matrix, and diet matrix from Lauria (2016).

#Life history data from fishbase
data(life_history_fishbase)
life_history_fishbase$l_mat <- c(27.15, 42.36707, 23.473, 21.13458, 25.1, 
                                 32.87942, 55.0, 22.9, 28.06812, 17.73243, 
                                 20.62504, 20.8603,  9.2, 21.31807)

#maturity values calculated from survey data
#data(cs_calculated_histories)

#combine life_history_fishbase and calculated l_mat
#life_histories<-life_history_fishbase%>%
#    mutate(
#        l_mat=case_when(
#        l_mat.y %in% c(NA_character_) ~ l_mat.x,
#        TRUE ~ l_mat.y),
#        age_mat=case_when(
#        age_mat.x %in% c(NA_character_) ~ age_mat.y,    
#        TRUE ~ age_mat.x))%>%
#    arrange(species)%>%
#    select(-l_mat.x, -l_mat.y, -age_mat.x, -age_mat.y)

#Load in ecopath data
ecopath_estimates <- read.csv(here("inst","extdata","Ecopath-Basic estimates.csv"))

Gurnards <- ecopath_estimates[46, ]
Boarfish <- ecopath_estimates[49, ]
num_cols <- sapply(Gurnards, is.numeric)
Red_gurnard<-Gurnards
Other_Gurnards<-Gurnards
Boarfish<-Boarfish
Small_pelag<-Boarfish
Red_gurnard[num_cols] <- Gurnards[num_cols] * 0.37
Red_gurnard$Group.name<-"Red gurnard"
Other_Gurnards[num_cols] <- Gurnards[num_cols] * 0.63
Boarfish[num_cols]<- Boarfish[num_cols] * 0.97
Boarfish$Group.name<-"Boarfish"
Small_pelag[num_cols]<- Boarfish[num_cols] * 0.03
#doesn't matter that tropic level and hab area are being affected as they are not used in calculations
ecopath_params<-ecopath_estimates[-c(46,49),]
ecopath_params<-rbind(ecopath_params,Other_Gurnards, Red_gurnard, Boarfish, Small_pelag)

#Diet matrix
data(diet)

#Deaths from fishing
data(fishing_deaths)

#Catch Distribution
data(catch_distribution)
catch_distribution<-catch_distribution%>%filter(!species=="Dragonet")


#DATRAS size distribution
data(survey_length_distribution)
survey_length_distribution<-survey_length_distribution%>%
    filter(!species=="Dragonet")

#DATRAS age at length distribution
data(cs_age_size)
#boar<-readRDS("/Users/jessicawestworth/Desktop/boarfish_struct_like_DATRAS.rds")
#cs_age_size<-rbind(cs_age_size,boar)

#determining l_max comparing landings max length versus fishbase max length recorded value
observed_max <- catch_distribution %>%
     group_by(species) %>%
     summarise(
         obs_len = if (all(is.na(length + dl))) NA_real_ else max(length + dl, na.rm = TRUE)
     )
life_histories <- life_history_fishbase %>%
    left_join(observed_max, by = "species")%>%
    mutate(
        l_max = pmax(obs_len, l_max))%>%
    select(-obs_len)

#combined survey fishing and STECF fishing
all_fishing<-rbind(catch_distribution,survey_length_distribution)

Species Parameters

Assign species parameters from life history data

#calculate w_mat and w_max and set n,p,d, and alpha parameter
sp_params<-life_histories%>%
    mutate(w_mat=a*l_mat^b,
           w_max=a*l_max^b,
           n=0.7,
           p=0.7,
           d=-0.3,
           alpha=0.7,
           biomass_cutoff=w_mat)

species_to_groups <- list(
    Herring          = "Herring",
    Cod              = c("Cod", "Juvenile cod"),
    Haddock          = c("Haddock","Juvenile haddock"),
    Whiting          = c("Whiting","Juvenile whiting"),
    `Blue whiting`   = c("Blue whiting","Juvenile blue whiting"),
    Hake             = c("Hake","Juvenile hake"),
    Monkfish         = c("Monkfish","Juvenile monkfish"),
    `Horse mackerel` = "Horse mackerel",
    Mackerel         = "Mackerel",
    Plaice           = c("Plaice","Juvenile plaice"),
    Megrim           = c("Megrim","Juvenile megrim"),
    Sole             = "Sole",
    Boarfish         = "Boarfish",
    `Red gurnard`      = "Red gurnard"
)

sp <- sp_params
sp <- addEcopathParams(sp, ecopath_params, species_to_groups)

adult_map <- tibble::tibble(
  species      = names(species_to_groups),
  adult_stanza = vapply(species_to_groups, function(x) x[[1]], character(1))
)

adult_biomass <- ecopath_params %>%
  group_by(Group.name) %>%
  summarise(
    biomass_observed = sum(Biomass..t.km.2., na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(adult_stanza = Group.name)

sp <- sp %>%
  select(-any_of("biomass_observed")) %>%  # drop if present from a previous run
  left_join(adult_map, by = "species") %>%
  left_join(adult_biomass, by = "adult_stanza") %>%
  mutate(
    biomass_observed = coalesce(biomass_observed, 0),
    biomass_cutoff   = w_mat
  ) %>%
  select(-adult_stanza)

sp$biomass_cutoff[c(1,8,9,12,13,14)]<-1

sp<-sp[c(5,13,2,3,6,1,8,9,11,7,10,14,12,4),]

Build Non-Interacting Model 

model_non_int <- newAllometricParams(sp_params, no_w = 200)

## Add gear params
model_non_int <- addCatch(model_non_int, landings= catch_distribution,
                              fishing_dead_biomass=fishing_deaths,
                              survey= survey_length_distribution)

# Steady model
model_non_int <- model_non_int %>%
    steadySingleSpecies() %>%
    matchBiomasses() %>%
    steadySingleSpecies() %>%
    matchBiomasses()%>%
    steadySingleSpecies() %>%
    matchBiomasses()%>%
    steadySingleSpecies() %>%
    matchBiomasses()%>%
    steadySingleSpecies() %>%
    matchBiomasses()

params<-model_non_int
sps<-species_params(model_non_int)
initial_Eiw<-array(dim=length(sps$species))
for(i in 1:length(sps$species)){
    initial_Eiw[i]<-getExtEncounter(params)[i,1]/(w(params)[1]^sp[i,]$n)}
sps$Eiw<-initial_Eiw
species_params(model_non_int)<-sps

#set the spawning time, spawning concentration and mu mortality of species to predetermined values.

#spawning_mort<-tuneEcopath(
#    model_non_int, 
#    catch = all_fishing,
#    age_at_length = cs_age_size)

#saveRDS(spawning_mort,"/Users/jessicawestworth/Desktop/spawning_mort.rds")

Add Diets and Predation Kernel 

#Adjust diet matrix for integration into model using reduceEcopathDiet
dm<-reduceEcopathDiet(
    species_params = species_params(final),
    ecopath_diet   = diet,
    ecopath_params = ecopath_params
)

# Stomach-fit parameters (keep separate; align by scientific name), cannot do right now because the new species are not in the processed file right now so... yeah...
data(stomach_data_fit)
stf<-stomach_data_fit
sp  <- species_params(final)
idx <- match(sp$Scientific_name, stf$species)  # align order to species_params

lambda <- 2
sp$pred_kernel_type <- "power_law"
sp$kernel_exp <- stf$alpha[idx] + 4/3 - lambda
sp$kernel_l_l <- stf$ll[idx]
sp$kernel_u_l <- stf$ul[idx]
sp$kernel_l_r <- stf$lr[idx]
sp$kernel_u_r <- stf$ur[idx]

species_params(model_non_int) <- sp

Continuous Re-tuning 

initial<-readRDS("/Users/jessicawestworth/Desktop/initial.rds")
initial<-validParams(initial)

final1<-readRDS("/Users/jessicawestworth/Desktop/Status Quo Starting Models/final1.rds")


blue_whiting<-tuneEcopath(
    s, 
    catch = all_fishing,
    age_at_length = cs_age_size,
    diet = dm)

#steadySingleSpecies(blue_whiting)
#saveRDS(final,"/Users/jessicawestworth/Desktop/Status Quo Starting Models/final1.rds")

Prepare Model for Projection 

s <- steadySingleSpecies(final)
g <- setFeedingLevels(params=s, f=0.6, f_c=0.2)

plotSpectra2(p,s)

params <- p
dm <- dm
params <- validParams(params)

# Set diffusion from d_over_g
# d(w) = d_over_g * g(w) * w
for (species in species_params(params)$species) {
    d_over_g <- species_params(params)[species, "d_over_g"]
    w <- params@w
    growth <- getEGrowth(params)[species, ]
    n <- params@species_params[species, "n"]
    g_0 <- growth[1] / w[1]^n
    d_0 <- d_over_g * g_0
    diffusion(params)[species, ] <- d_0 * w^(n + 1)
}

resource_params(params)$w_pp_cutoff <- 1

ps <- params |>
    mizer::steadySingleSpecies() |>
    alignResource() |>
    setResourceInteraction(resource_dynamics = "resource_semichemostat") |>
    matchDiet(dm) |> 
    setBevertonHolt(reproduction_level = 0.8)

ps_non<-unserialize(serialize(ps, NULL))

#Project
sim1 <- project(ps, t_max = 100)

#Compare the status quo projection to status quo initial params object
plotBiomass(sim1)

#sim2 <- project(ps, t_max = 100)

#plotBiomass(sim2)

#plotSpectra2(ps,params)
#plotSpectra2(sim,ps)

BH Model Projection 

# Initialize the blender
# Let's say we want to transition over 20 years with a harvest intensity of 0.15, but then we want to keep fishing at BH till true steady state is reached.
t_duration <-300
og_sim_steady_in<-100
t_blend <- 200
c_intensity <- 0

my_blender <- make_blended_ssBH_FMort(t_max_blend = t_blend, 
                                      target_c = c_intensity,
                                      t_steady = og_sim_steady_in,
                                      alpha_max = 1)

# Inject function into params
#sim_BH_start<- setRateFunction(ps, "FMort", "my_blender")

# Run the simulation
# Use effort = 1; the blender handles the internal weights
#sim_BH_4 <- project(sim_BH_start, t_max = t_duration, effort = 1)

#plotlyBiomass(sim_BH_4)

Compare the Status Quo Sim to the Balanced Harvest Sim 

#Compare
plotSpectra2(sim,sim_BH)

Comparing

#Fishing Mort
f_mort<-getFMort(sim_BH)
fmort100<-as.numeric(f_mort[100,5,])
fmort500<-as.numeric(f_mort[500,5,])

plot(fmort100~log(w), type="l")
points(fmort500~log(w), type="l",col="blue")
legend("topright", fill=c("black","blue"), legend=c("Status","BH"))

#Pred Mort
p_mort<-getPredMort(sim_BH)
pmort100<-as.numeric(p_mort[100,5,])
pmort500<-as.numeric(p_mort[500,5,])

plot(pmort100~log(w), type="l",col="black")
points(pmort500~log(w), type="l", col="blue")
legend("topright", fill=c("black","blue"), legend=c("Status","BH"))
Biomass<-getBiomass(sim_BH)
sum(Biomass[99,])
sum(Biomass[999,])
N<-getN(sim_BH)
sum(N[99,])
sum(N[999,])
SSB<-getSSB(sim_BH)
sum(SSB[99,])
sum(SSB[999,])
Yield<-getYield(sim_BH)
sum(Yield[99,])
sum(Yield[999,])


Yi<-getYield(sim_BH_easy)
sum(Yi[99,])
sum(Yi[299,])
